name: cibermundo-assist
description: Monorepo para sistema de escaneo offline-first de Interrapidísimo

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:worker" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix worker && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix worker && npm run build --prefix frontend
